mnemonics.title: Heapify Direction
mnemonics.content: Heapify DOWN for extraction (root removal), Heapify UP for insertion (new element). Think: Extract goes DOWN to root, Insert goes UP from leaf.

mnemonics.title: Heap Properties
mnemonics.content: HEAP: H-Hierarchical, E-Complete, A-Array representation, P-Parent-child order, P-Priority Queue foundation.

mnemonics.title: Child Formulas
mnemonics.content: LEFT = 2i + 1 (i is L-1), RIGHT = 2i + 2, PARENT = (i-1)/2. Remember: Left is +1, Right is +2 from base 2i.

acronyms.expansion: Last In First Out - NOT heap (heap is NOT LIFO)
acronyms.usage: Remember heaps are NOT LIFO; they are priority-based, not order-based.

acronyms.expansion: Complete Binary Tree - property of all heaps
acronyms.usage: Heaps must always be CBTs, filled left to right.

acronyms.expansion: Maximum at Root - for descending order sorting
acronyms.usage: Max-heap gives descending order when extracting max repeatedly.

acronyms.expansion: Minimum at Root - for ascending order sorting
acronyms.usage: Min-heap gives ascending order when extracting min repeatedly.

visualTips.visualization: Draw index 0 as root, then place 1,2 on level 2, 3,4,5,6 on level 3 in order. Visualize children as 2i+1 and 2i+2 spreading diagonally down-left and down-right.
Think of air bubbles rising in water. The inserted element 'bubbles up' to its correct position, swapping with parent repeatedly.
Think of a heavy object sinking. The element 'sinks down' by comparing with children and moving to the appropriate child position.
Imagine filling water in a container - you fill one level completely before moving to the next, always from left to right.

analogies.analogy: Think of a hospital emergency room where patients are treated by severity, not arrival time. The heap ensures the most critical (max priority) patient is always at the front.
In a max-heap, think of family where elders (parents) are always older than children. The oldest family member (maximum) sits at the head of the table (root).
Imagine a tournament where you keep finding the winner (max), removing them, and then finding the next winner from the remaining. Each extraction is O(log n).

analogies.concept: Building Heap as Organizing Disorganized Books
analogies.analanalogy: Think of organizing books on a shelf by height. You start from the middle and fix each 'pile' of books, comparing and swapping until the tallest is on the left (max-heap).
